title: Expose borrowed iteration explicitly
scenario: Callers often need to inspect a collection wrapper without consuming it. A borrowed iterator exposes a view without leaking fields.
instructions: Add OrderLines::iter(&self) -> std::slice::Iter<'_, OrderLine>. Keep as_slice so callers can choose either a slice or an iterator.

hints.body: iter should borrow self; it should not clone the Vec.

completionExplanation: The wrapper now supports idiomatic borrowed iteration without exposing its inner Vec.
